3299960.name: Doodle Knight
3299960.description:
Doodle Knight is a charming 2D puzzle-platformer that puts the power of creativity in your hands! Play as a brave knight armed with not just a sword but a magical pen and pencil. Explore a whimsical, hand-drawn castle filled with traps, and mind-bending puzzles that only your imagination can solve.

Draw platforms, bridges, and tools to overcome hazards, and unlock hidden paths. Every scribble matters—solve puzzles your way, with endless possibilities at your fingertips.

Will your creativity be enough to defeat the challenges? Grab your pen and get ready to doodle your way to victory!
